mapper.insert: insert into doc(docid, docname, doctype, docroomid, status, owner, createtime) values (#{docid}, #{docname}, #{doctype}, #{docroomid}, #{status}, #{owner}, #{createtime})
mapper.select: select docname, doctype, status, createtime, docid from doc where docname=#{docname} and doctype=#{doctype}

select d.docname, d.doctype, d.status, d.docid, d.createtime, d.updatetime, u.uname as updater from doc d left join user u on d.owner = u.uid where d.status != -1 and d.docroomid = #{roomid} order by d.updatetime desc
select count(*) from doc where status != -1 and docroomid = #{roomid}

select d.docname, d.doctype, d.status, d.docid, d.createtime, d.updatetime, u.uname as updater from doc d left join user u on d.owner = u.uid where d.status != -1 and d.docroomid = #{roomid} order by d.updatetime desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
